```{=html}
<aside class="side-panel findings-sidebar">
<details open>
<summary>Findings at a glance</summary>
<ol>
  <li><strong>Matching means ≠ matching distributions.</strong> At
  Q = Q*, fee and back-to-back share E[Π] but are near-mirror images;
  the principal book gets a left-skewed loss tail.</li>
  <li><strong>Hedging is a linear dial.</strong> Pre-buying α of
  inventory collapses SD and CVaR as (1−α); C<sub>basis</sub>
  translates mean only, not tails.</li>
  <li><strong>A switch truncates, doesn't rescale.</strong> Quote
  up-front, flip to fee at S<sub>t</sub> = h·S<sub>0</sub>: CVaR₉₅
  collapses ~80× while E[Π] rises. Levers (α, β, h) compose.</li>
</ol>
</details>
</aside>
```
